projectDescription: A self-hosted Discord ticket bot built with Python that uses buttons and select menus to let server members open, manage, and close support tickets.
keyFeatures: Ticket creation via interactive Discord button
Select menu to categorize tickets (Question, Help, Report)
Automatic private ticket channels with scoped permissions
Call Staff button to ping the staff role inside a ticket
Close Ticket button with confirmation prompt
Ticket logs channel with embed summary on close
Bot status showing total member count across guilds
publicApiSurface: tb!ticket — deploys the ticket creation panel embed (admin only)
on_button_click — handles Ticket, call_staff, close_ticket, close_yes, close_no interactions
on_select_option — handles menu select (question, help, report) to create ticket channels
id_category — configuration variable for ticket channel category
id_channel_ticket_logs — configuration variable for logs channel
id_staff_role — configuration variable for staff role
embed_color — hex color used for all bot embeds
